package example

import (
	goqu "github.com/doug-martin/goqu/v9"
)

func queries() {
	// Should be extracted: goqu.L with raw SQL.
	goqu.L("SELECT * FROM users")

	// Should be extracted: another SQL literal.
	goqu.L("DELETE FROM sessions WHERE expired = true")

	// Should NOT be extracted: non-L method call.
	goqu.From("users").Select("id", "name")

	// valk-guard:disable VG001
	goqu.L("SELECT * FROM orders")
}
